pillars.title: Participatory Governance
pillars.summary: Structured petition, feedback, and escalation pathways connecting citizens directly to Assembly and Executive.

pillars.title: Civic Readiness
pillars.summary: Self-assessment tools and guided onboarding to prepare citizens for meaningful governance participation.

pillars.title: Contribution Pathways
pillars.summary: Skill-matched routing to Corps projects, ministry roles, and community initiatives based on citizen interests.

pillars.title: Transparent Activity
pillars.summary: Real-time civic activity feed with filtering, status tracking, and public accountability metrics.

programs.title: Petition Escalation Pipeline
programs.summary: Automated threshold detection, Assembly routing, and public tracking for citizen petitions meeting signature requirements.

programs.title: Civic Readiness Self-Check
programs.summary: Interactive checklist assessing charter knowledge, cryptographic literacy, protocol familiarity, and governance comfort.

programs.title: Contribution Path Finder
programs.summary: Interest-based routing to engineering, governance, outreach, node operation, security, and documentation tracks.

programs.title: Feedback & Issue Triage
programs.summary: Categorized intake, SLA tracking, and escalation to judicial review for platform, governance, identity, economy, and documentation issues.

tools.title: Petition Builder
tools.summary: Guided form for creating structured petitions with target authority, signature goals, deadlines, and charter citations.

tools.title: Readiness Self-Check
tools.summary: Six-point checklist scoring citizen readiness with personalized guidance for charter review, crypto literacy, and governance participation.

tools.title: Contribution Path Finder
tools.summary: Interest selector mapping to engineering, governance, outreach, node operation, security, and documentation contribution paths.

tools.title: Feedback Submission
tools.summary: Categorized feedback intake with optional contact, subject tagging, and automatic routing to relevant ministry teams.

tools.title: Civic Activity Feed
tools.summary: Filterable, sortable feed of petitions, feedback, and governance actions with type, status, and date controls.

tools.title: Petition Signing
tools.summary: One-click signing with localStorage persistence, duplicate prevention, and real-time progress tracking toward escalation thresholds.

reports.title: Quarterly Civic Participation Report
reports.summary: Analysis of petition volumes, signature rates, feedback categories, tool adoption, and demographic participation patterns.

reports.title: Onboarding Effectiveness Study
reports.summary: Correlation of readiness scores with subsequent petition creation, feedback submission, and Corps enrollment.

reports.title: Escalation Outcomes Review
reports.summary: Review of Assembly actions on escalated petitions, judicial review outcomes for feedback, and citizen satisfaction metrics.
